pi_items.source: task.json description section specifies 'Save the query as CustomerDirectory'
task.json description mentions all four functions; web search confirms all are supported in HSQLDB 1.8

task.json description lists exact columns required; source Chinook Customer table contains all necessary source columns (CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Address, City, State, PostalCode, Country, Phone, Fax, Email)
setup_libreoffice_base.sh script copies Chinook ODB to this path: 'cp /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb /home/ga/chinook.odb'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Chinook sample database, a well-known demo dataset (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) containing partially synthetic data: media data sourced from iTunes, while customer and employee data are manually crafted with fictional details and auto-generated sales records. The database will be available at /home/ga/chinook.odb in HSQLDB 1.8 format. The task requires creating a saved SQL query named 'CustomerDirectory' that produces six columns (CustomerId, FormattedName, FullAddress, EmailDomain, Phone, Fax) from the Customer table using SQL functions supported by HSQLDB 1.8: UPPER for case conversion, COALESCE for null handling, SUBSTRING and LOCATE for email domain extraction.
